data.title: Agentic AI to power much of ecommerce tech support
data.description: Nearly all respondents (93%) to a Cisco survey said they believe the technology will make digital customer journeys more predictive and seamless.

data.title: Tariffs lead cross-border ecommerce to roadblocks
data.description: EPost analyzed 15.6 million international e-commerce shipments totaling $421 million and found that 73% of product categories now fall under tariff-sensitive classifications—a sharp increase from prior years. As a result, many retailers are now facing steep compliance challenges and unexpected costs.

data.title: RIVR and Veho launch robot-powered parcel delivery
data.description: The Austin pilot is a first step in what both companies hope will become a broader rollout across the U.S. later this year.

data.title: Ecommerce earnings recap: What you missed from TJX, Ralph Lauren and more
data.description: Tariffs and economic uncertainty remained present on earnings calls as Ralph Lauren credited ecommerce sales in its earnings.

data.title: GSA introduces OneGov Strategy to standardize federal IT procurement
data.description: The new approach centralizes purchasing, focuses on direct OEM engagement, and responds to an executive order on federal contracting reform.
